steps.title: Describe what the sentence does
steps.content: The underlined sentence says the Hibulb Cultural Center uses traditional knowledge in exhibit design and presents Tulalip history and culture to tribal citizens. It gives basic factual information about that center.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported purposes
steps.content: A invents suggested improvements, B invents encouragement to attend, and C claims a comparison with other tribal cultural centers. The sentence simply describes one particular tribal cultural center. The answer is D.
